reviews.review_description:
It's not bad, but it could use some variety, like dual-color guns/targets, for example. Also, I don't know what the difference is between the triangular and "face" target..
UPDATE/REPLY:
Please keep it simple and fast. No extra strategy — I just want to play, not overthink it. Keep it fun! Just polish it and add a little variety.
UPDATE 2:
I don’t understand why you changed the game from a 360-degree shooter into this. When I suggested adding a dual color mode (à la Beat Saber), I meant it only as an optional mode in the original version of the game. Please revert it back — in its current form it’s absolutely uninteresting to me, and I would never buy the game in this version.

reviews.review_title: WHY DID YOU CHANGE THE GAME TO THIS???
reviews.review_description:
I originally gave this game 5 stars because it was a fast-paced, immersive VR experience focused on dodging hazards and reacting under pressure. It genuinely felt like you were inside the game, and the challenge came from movement, awareness, and survival.

That game no longer exists.

A recent update completely removed the original gameplay and replaced it with a match/puzzle-style system that feels more like a Candy Crush–style mechanic than a VR action game. Enemies no longer pose real threats, there’s little to dodge, and the focus has shifted to pressing specific buttons — which is especially frustrating in VR when you can’t easily see controller labels without breaking immersion.

I wouldn’t be nearly as upset if the original mode had been preserved as a separate option. This could have been a collection of reaction-based VR challenges, with the new puzzle mode added for variety. Instead, the core experience that made the game special was deleted entirely.

If you’re buying this now, be aware that the gameplay shown in early reviews — including my original 5-star review — is no longer what you’re getting.

Was hoping to train reflexes and my agility speed, kinda sad about it cause, the space you have is nothing to move on, the game doesnt tell you what to do, you shoot at monsters around you but cant shoot twice some sort of cooldown

Kinda sad, ill refund maybe in the near future, but for now its a waste of time and money, sorry dev rev up the game

developer_response.body: Hey, Thanks for playing the game. We are working on an update to make the game close to what we planned to do. That is more focus on cognition and strategy.  Stay tuned for the update.
